next_steps: Perform contrast-enhanced MRI of the brain and entire spine to assess for meningeal enhancement or parasitic tracks
Send CSF for Angiostrongylus cantonensis real-time PCR
Send serum and CSF for specialized parasitic serologic testing (Gnathostoma, Strongyloides, Coccidioides)
Coordinate with CDC for specialized testing (e.g., Balamuthia mandrillaris IFA or PCR)
Repeat lumbar puncture if clinical status deteriorates or if initial results are inconclusive
Continue supportive care and symptomatic pain management for neuropathic symptoms
Maintain empirical broad-spectrum coverage until results return, specifically monitoring for signs of worsening cerebral edema
